name: QuillBot
price_basis: Premium annual plan at $99.95, represented as $8.33 monthly after cent rounding, checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: KILL: $100 a year to paraphrase text until nobody wrote it. Your Zo can edit toward your real voice.
what_zo_builds: A private rewrite command with explicit modes for shortening, clarifying, changing tone, checking grammar, and preserving quotations. It reads the user's house style and shows a diff instead of returning anonymous paraphrase soup.
dont_kill_if: You need QuillBot's browser extension across locked-down school or work devices, or a required institutional workflow depends on it. Otherwise the feature is a prompt with a diff viewer.
build_brief: Goal: replace QuillBot Premium with a private rewrite workflow on Zo. Create commands for shorten, clarify, formalize, simplify, and grammar check. Read my writing rules before each rewrite, preserve citations and quoted text, and output a side-by-side diff. Never overwrite the source. Done when the same five samples improve without changing their claims or flattening their voice.
